name: Challenge the zombies
description: Challenge The Zombies ek action packed aur thrilling zombie shooting game hai jisme aapko dangerous zombies ke against fight karna hota hai. Is game me aap ek brave survivor ban kar apni weapons skills use karte hain aur zombie apocalypse se duniya ko save karte hain. Har level me zombies aur zyada powerful hote jate hain, aur aapko apni strategy aur fast shooting reflexes se survive karna hota hai. Ye game intense missions, exciting gameplay aur nonstop action se bhara hua hai. Agar aapko zombie survival games, shooting action games, aur offline zombie attack games pasand hain to Challenge The Zombies aapke liye best choice hai.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
